nasb.text: In view of this, I also do my best to maintain always a blameless conscience both before God and before men.

esv.text: So I always take pains to have a clear conscience toward both God and man.

cnv.text: 因此，我常常勉勵自己，對　神對人要常存無虧的良心。

ccb.text: 因此，我一直尽力在上帝和人面前都做到问心无愧。

csbs.text: 因此，在神和人面前，我总是尽力存着无愧的良心。
